detail_desc: Don't even think about it, she'll kick your head in.
long_desc: Cynder stands here, guarding the warrior guild entrance.

detail_desc: There is nothing special about this master.
long_desc: A warrior guildmaster is here, waiting to train you.

detail_desc:
A very earthy looking man, dark hair, scruffy beard and very plain clothing.
He is respected by all, and feared by many, many more.  His skill of earthy
elements will make anyone hurt.
long_desc: Nnoa is here, preventing all those who may enter the Ranger training grounds.

detail_desc: There is nothing special about this master.
long_desc: A Ranger guildmaster is here, waiting to train you.

detail_desc:
He stands silently with arms crossed, hands concealed in his robe.  With
hood covering his face, you can not tell his intentions, lest you try and pass
him.
long_desc: Deke stands silently, allowing only the holiest to enter.

detail_desc: There is nothing special about this master.
long_desc: A Cleric guildmaster is here, waiting to train you.

detail_desc:
He fiddles with his cape, organizing many scrolls making sure not to lose
track of a single one.  He lifts an eye for a second, and then retrieves a
scroll from a pouch on his belt.
long_desc: Sersin is here, guarding the mage guild.

detail_desc: There is nothing special about this master.
long_desc: A Mage's guildmaster is here, waiting to train you.

detail_desc: Watch It!  You'll go blind, literally, if you stare that long.
long_desc: Ryske peeks at you from the shadows.

detail_desc: There is nothing special about this master.
long_desc: An assassin guild master is here, waiting to train you.

detail_desc:
Her hair lies loosely on her shoulders, covering half her face.  She brushes
it back and leans casually against the wall thinking nothing of you.  She
crosses her arms a closes her eyes, almost daring you to pass.
long_desc: Alexa stands with back to the wall, eying you curiously.

detail_desc: There is nothing special about this master.
long_desc: A Deathknight guildmaster is here waiting to train you.

detail_desc: With no expression whatsoever, this man goes about his business.
long_desc: A Deathknight is here, quietly waiting to sell you something.

detail_desc:
Too bad she could probably drop you with one good blow (get it, blow?  ),
otherwise you could ask her out.
long_desc: A lovely female assassin is here, helping others find what they need.

detail_desc:
This guy looks perfectly happy to just stand and contemplate all the live
long day.
long_desc: A monk from the guild stands here quietly, waiting on you.

detail_desc:
You cannot tell if this man be evil or good aligned, nor where his loyalties
may lie.  Who cares, he has good stuff for sale!
long_desc: A member of the Mage's Guild awaits your purchase behind the counter.
short_desc: a member of the Mage's Guild

detail_desc: Gendar looks almost amused by the fact that you were startled so easily.
long_desc: Gendar the elven thief leans in a corner of the room, a small grin on his face.

detail_desc: Ugly, maybe, but just as deadly.  Don't piss him off.
long_desc: Wirntyn grins as you walk in.  Man, he looks even uglier when he smiles!

detail_desc:
This tough little bitch has beaten down more foes than most men can boast
their friends have all added together.  And she's a hottie.
long_desc: Griselda tends bar for all her warrior friends.

detail_desc:
You'd think that if you could get past the first chair tossing, they'd leave
you alone, but it looks as if you are in for a bit of fun...  Duck!
long_desc: A drunken warrior is in the midst of hefting another chair, this time taking careful aim.

detail_desc: You can smell him from here.
long_desc: A drunk warrior grins his toothy grin at you, flexing his huge biceps.

detail_desc:
Dressed in the finest armor, this man obviously preys on the stupidity of
the people of the Cove.
long_desc: A bookie stands here, willing to take any bet.

detail_desc:
Just from the way she looks makes you want to get in that Pit and risk your
life.
long_desc: The Ticket Master, a beautiful and enticing woman, waits to sell you your chance to die.

detail_desc:
More of an apprentice than anything else, this employee is one who pulled
extra duty for misconduct within the guild.
long_desc: An employee of the Warrior Guild is here waiting to help you.
short_desc: an employee of the warrior guild

detail_desc:
This man could be good or evil, or whatever - but who gives a shit - he has
kickass eq for sale!
long_desc: A member of the Mage's Guild waits patiently for you to buy something.
short_desc: a member of the Mage's Guild

detail_desc: She looks eager enough to sell you the goods.
long_desc: A member of the Mage's Guild stands behind the counter.
short_desc: a member of the mage's guild

detail_desc:
He seems intent on the workings of one of the scrolls, making sure that it
will perform its proper function.
long_desc: A member of the Mage's Guild waits patiently for your purchase.
short_desc: a member of the Mage's Guild

detail_desc:
More of an apprentice than anything else, this employee is one who pulled
extra duty for misconduct within the guild.
long_desc: An employee of the Warrior Guild is here waiting to help you.
short_desc: an employee of the warrior guild

detail_desc:
More of an apprentice than anything else, this employee is one who pulled
extra duty for misconduct within the guild.
long_desc: An employee of the Warrior Guild is here waiting to help you.
short_desc: an employee of the warrior guild

detail_desc:
More of an apprentice than anything else, this employee is one who pulled
extra duty for misconduct within the guild.
long_desc: An employee of the Warrior Guild is here waiting to help you.
short_desc: an employee of the warrior guild

detail_desc:
You can almost smell her putrid breath from here.  As you watch her
pirouette clumsily on the table, you notice a breast fall saggily and limply
out of the loose rag she wears.  Seemingly unembarrassed, Yolanda tucks her tit
back into her rag and continues her 'extremely seductive' dance.
long_desc: Yolanda the Bar-Slut dances on the only remaining intact table.

detail_desc:
He stares into what you would assume is empty space, but for him is the
space that his God occupies.
long_desc: A member of the Cleric's Guild waits patiently for you to shop.
short_desc: a member of the Cleric's Guild

detail_desc:
He stares into what you would assume is empty space, but for him is the
space that his God occupies.
long_desc: A member of the Cleric's Guild waits patiently for you to shop.
short_desc: a member of the Cleric's Guild

detail_desc:
He stares into what you would assume is empty space, but for him is the
space that his God occupies.
long_desc: A member of the Cleric's Guild waits patiently for you to shop.
short_desc: a member of the Cleric's Guild

detail_desc:
He notices you looking and his sneer becomes even more pronounced than
before.  Better just buy your stuff and get out of here.
long_desc: A Deathknight sneers as he waits for you to buy something.

detail_desc:
She looks up at you as she sews and smiles a pretty smile, going back to her
work while keeping an eye out in case you need any assistance.
long_desc: A Paladin Seamstress works diligently on some fabric as you browse the goods.

detail_desc:
He seems to be very happy with his work, the allotment that the Guild has
given him.  It is a rare and fine thing to see such pride from a man who could
be more if he desired.
long_desc: A Paladin smith works here, pounding away at the forge.

detail_desc:
He beams a smile your way and holds up one finger - be with you in just one
moment!
long_desc: A member of the Paladin Guild is here helping the customers.
short_desc: a member of the Paladin Guild

detail_desc:
Paladin through and through - you can tell this guy is the Master's Pet, a
real ass-kiss and butt-puppy.
long_desc: Shindoz stands proudly at the entrance to the Guild, gently keeping non-members out.

detail_desc:
He smiles and looks you in the eye, as if reading your thoughts and virtue
all in one glance.  It almost makes you uneasy.
long_desc: The Master stands calmly here, ready to train if that is your need.

detail_desc: It's a looooooonng story - don't ask.
long_desc: Alastor looks just a bit unhappy about being a monk, but guards the door just the same.

detail_desc: He speaks no word, makes no move.  He simply waits.
long_desc: The Monk Guildmaster awaits your need quietly.
